en: I won't work for Microsoft, ever. Even if they offer me a job. Period. End of story.
I believe that Ubuntu Mono is the undisputed best font for programming.
I actually know seven languages to some degree: Spanish, English, Esperanto, Catalan, Russian, toki pona and Latin.
I've been to Moscow, and got detained at the border with Estonia for lack of documentation.
I am a novelwriter. I've written three novels. None of them published (yet).
I prefer tea over coffee. Yes. Accept it. It's better, healthier and more ejoyable than that brown beverage of yours
I used to be an atheist for a while. Thank non-denominationalism and their non-philosophical approach to religion.
I have beaten only one videogame in my entire life. New Super Mario Bros Wii, back in 2010(ish).
I have as a goal for this quarter to visit every metro station in Mexico City and tour the 'curious' ones.
I had this project back in the 2010's to write an OS that could be retrocompatible and help old hardware continue being useful... So basically Tiny Core Linux
eo: Mi uzas Esperanton por nomi miajn teknikajn projektojn, kiel 'Tajpilo'.
La lingvo de Zamenhof estas perfekta por teknikaj raportoj.
Mi skribas miajn teologiajn artikolojn per LaTeX kaj Esperanto.
